title: polanisia schraderi
intro: Polanisia schraderi, also known as the Clammy Clover or Winged Clammy Clover, is a flowering plant species native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Polanisia schraderi include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Polanisia schraderi can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, sore throats, and digestive problems.
